summary: Refined the additive LLMWikiBook page into a calmer reader-first shell by slimming the global header, demoting the right rail into supportive context, flattening sidebar card chrome, and removing the outer stage card so the document owns the first screen.
follow_ups: Trim the remaining left-rail shelf density if the next packet wants an even stronger GitBook-style calm shell.
Refine Studio sidecar copy and control density so the editing lane feels as intentional as the new reader shell.
If needed, tune the viewer editorial variant next so the inner article hero aligns even more tightly with the outer LLMWikiBook shell.
